---
title: "156: Linescores"
date: "2025-10-08"
categories:
  - gtUtils
  - gtExtras
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Code"
editor: visual
---

### Load data

```{r load-data, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
library(rlang)
library(cbbplotR)

# gt save function
gt_save_crop <- function(data,
                         file = NULL,
                         bg = "white",
                         whitespace = 50,
                         zoom = 2,
                         expand = 5) {
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png")
  
  tryCatch({
    gtExtras::gtsave_extra(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  }, error = function(e) {
    message("gtsave_extra failed, trying gt::gtsave...")
    gt::gtsave(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand)
  })
  
  magick::image_read(tmp) |> 
    magick::image_trim() |> 
    magick::image_border(bg, glue::glue('{whitespace}x{whitespace}')) |> 
    magick::image_write(file)
  unlink(tmp)
}


```

### Linescores

```{r linescore, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

line_score <- tibble::tribble(
  ~team,            ~inning_1, ~inning_2, ~inning_3, ~inning_4, ~inning_5, ~inning_6, ~inning_7, ~inning_8, ~inning_9, ~inning_10, ~inning_11, ~inning_12, ~points, ~explosives, ~turnovers, 
  "Clemson",        7,         7,         7,         7,         0,         7,       0,           0, 3, 0, 0, NA, 38, 6, 1,
  "North Carolina", 3,         0,         0,         0,         0,         0,       0,          0, 0, 7, 0, 0, 10, 1, 1,
)

clem_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/228.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>Clemson 38, North Carolina 10</span>
       <span style='font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Possession-by-possession line score and relevant stats.<br>October 4, 2025 | Chapel Hill, NC</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/153.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>"
)


clem_tbl <- line_score |>
  dplyr::rename_with( ~ stringr::str_remove(.x, "inning_"),
                      dplyr::starts_with("inning_")) |>
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(team, team)  |>
  gt::gt()  |>
  gt::sub_missing(missing_text = "-") |>
  gt::fmt_markdown(team) |>
  gt::cols_align(team, align = "left") |>
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(clem_header)) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note =
      gt::html(
        "<b>Season records</b>: Clemson 2-3 (1-2 ACC), UNC 2-3 (0-1 ACC)<br>
        <b>Avg Starting Field Position</b>: Clemson own 37, UNC own 21<br>
        <b>Yards per play</b>: Clemson 6.97, UNC 4.50<br>
        <b>Clemson Drive outcomes</b>: TD (5), PUNT (3), FG (1), DOWNS (1), TO (1)<br> 
        <b>UNC Drive Outcomes</b>: PUNT (6), DOWNS (2), HALF (1), TD (1), FG (1), FGA (1)<br>
        <b>3rd down conversions</b>: Clemson 4-12, UNC 2-11<br>
        <b>Penalties total-yards</b>: Clemson 7-85, UNC 8-75<br>
        <b>E (Explosive plays of 20+ yards)</b> Clemson 6 (all passing), UNC 1 (passing)<br>
        <b>T (Turnovers)</b> Clemson 1 (fumble), UNC 1 (missed 50-yd field goal)<br>
        <hr style='border-color: black;'><b>Data via statbroadcast.com | Table by Chris at Bless your chart</b>"
      )
  ) |>
  gt::cols_label(
    team = "",
    points = "P",
    explosives = "E",
    turnovers = "T"
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_theme_dot_matrix() |>
  gt::tab_options (
    source_notes.font.size = gt::px(10),
    row.striping.background_color = '#ffffff',
    column_labels.text_transform = 'none',
    column_labels.font.weight = 'bold',
     table_body.border.bottom.color = "black",
    table_body.hlines.color = "black"
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(1),
    columns = c(2:5, 7, 10, 14:15),
    fill = "#FBC199"
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(2),
    columns = c(2, 11),
    fill = "#BBD9ED"
  ) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_grid(color = "black",
                          weight = 0.5,
                          include_labels = FALSE) |>
   gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_borders(
      sides = "bottom",
      color = "black",
      weight = gt::px(0.5)
    ),
    locations = gt::cells_body(rows = 1)
  ) |>
  gt::tab_spanner(label = "1st Half", columns = c(2:7)) |>
  gt::tab_spanner(label = "2nd Half", columns = c(8:13)) |>
  gtExtras::gt_add_divider(columns = c(7), sides = "right",
                           color = "black", weight = 0.5) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom(c("#636363", "#969696", "#cccccc"))

gt_save_crop(clem_tbl,
             file = "linescore_clem.png",
             whitespace = 60,
             bg = "white")

clem_tbl

# penn state vs ucla 
ucla_score <- tibble::tribble(
    ~team,        ~inning_1, ~inning_2, ~inning_3, ~inning_4, ~inning_5, ~inning_6, ~inning_7, ~inning_8, ~inning_9, ~inning_10, ~inning_11, ~inning_12, ~inning_13, ~points, ~explosives, ~turnovers, 
    "Penn State",  NA,        7,         0,         0,         0,         7,         7,         7,         7,         0,          0,          2, 0,        37,      4,           1,
    "UCLA",        7,         3,         7,         7,         3,         0,         0,         7,         8,         0,          0,          0,  NA,        42,      6,           2,
)

ucla_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/26.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>UCLA 42, Penn State 37</span>
       <span style='font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Possession-by-possession line score and relevant stats.<br>October 4, 2025 | Pasadena, CA</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/213.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>"
)


ucla_tbl <- ucla_score |>
  dplyr::rename_with( ~ stringr::str_remove(.x, "inning_"),
                      dplyr::starts_with("inning_")) |>
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(team, team)  |>
  gt::gt()  |>
  gt::sub_missing(missing_text = "-") |>
  gt::fmt_markdown(team) |>
  gt::cols_align(team, align = "left") |>
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(ucla_header)) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note =
      gt::html(
        "<b>Season records</b>: UCLA 1-4 (1-0 B10), Penn State 3-2 (0-2 B10)<br>
        <b>Avg Starting Field Position</b>: UCLA own 33, Penn State own 33<br>
        <b>Yards per play</b>: UCLA 5.65, Penn State 6.26 <br>
        <b>UCLA Drive outcomes</b>: TD (5), FG (2), PUNT (2), DOWNS (1), TO (1)<br> 
        <b>Penn State Drive Outcomes</b>: TD (5), DOWNS (3), HALF (1), TO (1), SAFETY (1), PUNT (1)<br>
        <b>3rd down conversions</b>: UCLA 10-16, Penn State 4-9<br>
        <b>Avg 3rd down distance</b>: UCLA 7.4, Penn State 5.7<br>
        <b>Penalties total-yards</b>: UCLA 5-35, Penn State 6-43<br>
        <b>E (Explosive plays of 20+ yards)</b> UCLA 6 (4 rushing, 2 passing), Penn State 4 (2 rushing, 2 passing)<br>
        <b>T (Turnovers)</b> UCLA 2 (missed 56-yd field goal, allowed blocked punt), Penn State 1 (fumble)<br>
        <hr style='border-color: black;'><b>Data via statbroadcast.com | Table by Chris at Bless your chart</b>"
      )
  ) |>
  gt::cols_label(
    team = "",
    points = "P",
    explosives = "E",
    turnovers = "T"
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_theme_dot_matrix() |>
  gt::tab_options (
    source_notes.font.size = gt::px(10),
    row.striping.background_color = '#ffffff',
    column_labels.text_transform = 'none',
    column_labels.font.weight = 'bold',
     table_body.border.bottom.color = "black",
    table_body.hlines.color = "black"
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(1),
    columns = c(3, 7:10, 13, 17),
    fill = "#9aa5b3"
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(2),
    columns = c(2:6, 9:10, 15, 16),
    fill = "#f9dc99"
  ) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_grid(color = "black",
                          weight = 0.5,
                          include_labels = FALSE) |>
   gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_borders(
      sides = "bottom",
      color = "black",
      weight = gt::px(0.5)
    ),
    locations = gt::cells_body(rows = 1)
  ) |>
  gt::tab_spanner(label = "1st Half", columns = c(2:6)) |>
  gt::tab_spanner(label = "2nd Half", columns = c(7:14)) |>
  gtExtras::gt_add_divider(columns = c(6), sides = "right",
                           color = "black", weight = 0.5) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom(c("#636363", "#969696", "#cccccc"))

gt_save_crop(ucla_tbl,
             file = "linescore_psu.png",
             whitespace = 60,
             bg = "white")

ucla_tbl

# fsu and miami
miami_score <- tibble::tribble(
  ~team,            ~inning_1, ~inning_2, ~inning_3, ~inning_4, ~inning_5, ~inning_6, ~inning_7, ~inning_8, ~inning_9, ~inning_10, ~inning_11, ~points, ~explosives, ~turnovers, 
  "Miami",          0,         7,         7,         0,         0,         0,         7,         7,         0,         0,          0,             28,      5,           0,
  "Florida State",  3,         0,         0,         0,         0,         0,         0,         0,         8,         8,          3,            22,      3,           3,
)


miami_header <- glue::glue(
  "<div style='display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;'>
      <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/2390.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
     <div style='flex-grow:1; margin-left: 30px; margin-right: 30px'>
       <span style='display: block; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; font-size: 24px;'>Miami 28, Florida State 22</span>
       <span style='font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; display: block; text-align: center;'>Possession-by-possession line score and relevant stats.<br>October 4, 2025 | Tallahassee, FL</span>
     </div>
     <div>
       <img src='https://a.espncdn.com/combiner/i?img=/i/teamlogos/ncaa/500/52.png'
       style='height: 40px; width: auto; vertical-align: middle;'>
     </div>
   </div>"
)


miami_tbl <- miami_score |>
  dplyr::rename_with( ~ stringr::str_remove(.x, "inning_"),
                      dplyr::starts_with("inning_")) |>
  cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(team, team)  |>
  gt::gt()  |>
  gt::sub_missing(missing_text = "-") |>
  gt::fmt_markdown(team) |>
  gt::cols_align(team, align = "left") |>
  gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(miami_header)) |>
  gt::tab_source_note(
    source_note =
      gt::html(
        "<b>Season records</b>: Miami 5-0 (1-0 ACC), FSU 3-2 (0-2 ACC)<br>
        <b>Avg Starting Field Position</b>: Miami own 34, FSU own 26<br>
        <b>Yards per play</b>: Miami 5.73, FSU 4.87 <br>
        <b>Miami Drive outcomes</b>: PUNT (5), TD (4), DOWNS (1), HALF (1)<br> 
        <b>FSU Drive Outcomes</b>: PUNT (4), TO (3), TD (2), FG (2)<br>
        <b>3rd down conversions</b>: Miami 5-14, FSU 7-16<br>
        <b>Avg 3rd down distance</b>: Miami 6.2, FSU 7.6<br>
        <b>Penalties total-yards</b>: Miami 13-114, FSU 5-45<br>
        <b>E (Explosive plays of 20+ yards)</b> Miami 5 (4 passing, 1 rushing), FSU 3 (all passing)<br>
        <b>T (Turnovers)</b> Miami 0, FSU 3 (2 interceptions, 1 fumble)<br>
        <hr style='border-color: black;'><b>Data via statbroadcast.com | Table by Chris at Bless your chart</b>"
      )
  ) |>
  gt::cols_label(
    team = "",
    points = "P",
    explosives = "E",
    turnovers = "T"
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_theme_dot_matrix() |>
  gt::tab_options (
    source_notes.font.size = gt::px(10),
    row.striping.background_color = '#ffffff',
    column_labels.text_transform = 'none',
    column_labels.font.weight = 'bold',
     table_body.border.bottom.color = "black",
    table_body.hlines.color = "black"
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(1),
    columns = c(3:4, 8:9, 13:15),
    fill = "#fac7a6"
  ) |>
  gtExtras::gt_highlight_rows(
    rows = c(2),
    columns = c(2, 10:12),
    fill = "#c9abb2"
  ) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_grid(color = "black",
                          weight = 0.5,
                          include_labels = FALSE) |>
   gt::tab_style(
    style = gt::cell_borders(
      sides = "bottom",
      color = "black",
      weight = gt::px(0.5)
    ),
    locations = gt::cells_body(rows = 1)
  ) |>
  gt::tab_spanner(label = "1st Half", columns = c(2:7)) |>
  gt::tab_spanner(label = "2nd Half", columns = c(8:12)) |>
  gtExtras::gt_add_divider(columns = c(7), sides = "right",
                           color = "black", weight = 0.5) |>
  gtUtils::gt_border_bars_bottom(c("#636363", "#969696", "#cccccc"))

gt_save_crop(miami_tbl,
             file = "linescore_miami.png",
             whitespace = 60,
             bg = "white")

miami_tbl

```

###
